c2q.statement: The lowest-shell bridge-readable quotient is one-dimensional, the Hawking beta_H-KMS one-mode state is unique, and the Paper 32 transfer is injective on that quotient.

gmp.typed_statement: Inside the realized typed bridge class, tensor type plus channel floor plus background placement fixes geometric mode placement.

transfer.quotient_injectivity_statement: On active shells N >= 1, T_field|_N = N^(-K_gauge/(2x)) > 0, so the derived one-slot transfer has no kernel there.
